Items.Name: SoulPlay
Items.Description: SoulPlay is kinda like a system's patch. Or like Urza could say A Fail-safe for the Fail-safe. it was made to obscure everything that was built before. It is not action-related, nor exploration. (Maybe a little bit) It is a simple cards collection game, hum hum ....with some kind of twist and incorporated lore. Until now the game feature about 100 differents cards and more will be added maybe in another future version. This is not a 40 hours gameplay complete game. It is a small game to enjoy and have fun. Still... there is a little bit more than just cards. There will be 10 physical DVD version (Cover to the left) randomly planted in USA and Canada in 2022. Those DVD ARE FREE TO TAKE.

Items.Name: SoulPlay Endtime
Items.Description: Not related to the first SoulPlay, but to show the way everything will end. It is the final ending of the Layer 4.

Items.Name: Anima Engine
Items.Description: Anima is a software that belongs to a branch of The Layer 4 Universe. If you have no idea what it is, you still can play it for free. The modules included with Anima concern the lore and stories of the Layer 4 Universe.

Items.Name: My Music Pack Vol.1
Items.Description: A collection of tracks. Downloads as a ZIP.
